summary: Completed testing of Peer Practice page 3-tab restructure. All backend APIs pass (23/23 tests). Frontend UI verified with 3 tabs (Find Peers, My Sessions, Availability) working correctly with all required features.

issues: Welcome tour modal appears on every page load - may want to add 'Don't show again' option or persist dismissal

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 tabs implemented correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Find Peers tab: Search filter, Plan/Rating/Stage dropdowns, peer cards with subscription badges, Book Session modal - all working
My Sessions tab: Upcoming and Past sessions sections, Join/Chat/Reschedule/Cancel buttons with proper data-testid attributes
Availability tab: Google Calendar connect/disconnect UI, WeeklyAvailabilitySelector, Max sessions dropdown, Calendar view with block/unblock days
All filter dropdowns have correct options (Elite/Pro/Subscribed/Free Trial for plans, 5/4+/3+ for ratings, advanced/intermediate/beginner for stages)
Peer cards display subscription_plan badge with correct color coding
Session action buttons (Chat, Reschedule, Cancel) properly implemented with data-testid attributes

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 3 tabs and features verified working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Peer Practice page has been restructured into 3 tabs. All features verified: 1) Find Peers tab with search/filters/peer cards/booking modal, 2) My Sessions tab with upcoming/past sessions and action buttons, 3) Availability tab with Google Calendar integration, weekly schedule, max sessions setting, and calendar view for blocking days. Backend APIs all working correctly.

tab_navigation.details: All 3 tabs (Find Peers, My Sessions, Availability) clickable and switch content correctly

features: Peer cards with subscription plan badge
Book Session button opens modal with date/time selection
Upcoming Sessions section with session count badge

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real and working

known_issues.react_razorpay_overlay: Dev-mode only error overlay from react-razorpay package. Can be dismissed with Escape key or clicking X. Does not affect production.
